title: ArtifactGate-EDA: An Adapter-Based Claim-Safe Artifact Evaluation Framework for Software-Only EDA Experiments
description: ArtifactGate-EDA is an open-source, adapter-based artifact evaluation framework for software-only EDA experiments. It standardizes artifact ingestion, provenance hashing, replay manifest generation, evidence-level classification, reproducibility checking, and unsupported-claim reporting across SPICE/ngspice, HDL simulation, and Yosys synthesis workflows.
